name: droplet-deploy
assertion: Deploy must push directly to the droplet via rsync (scripts/deploy.sh), not GitHub Actions

name: env-usage
assertion: The agent must use the DROPLET_IP from .env, never hardcode or print a different value

name: no-blind-commit
assertion: Deploy must never run git add/commit/push as a side effect — that is push's job, not deploy's

name: dirty-tree-gated
assertion: node .agent/skills/deploy/scripts/deploy.mjs exits non-zero on a dirty tree without --confirm-dirty

name: exclude-leading-slash
assertion: scripts/deploy.sh excludes /designs/ and /dist/ with a leading slash, not bare designs/ or dist/

name: health-check-present
assertion: scripts/deploy.sh checks the live site health endpoint after restart and fails loudly if unhealthy
